changelog:
🚀 Ultra-fast navigation using Jetpack Compose saveState/restoreState.
🔒 Restructured 401 interceptor with a 5-second cooldown to eliminate repeated logout cascades.
⚡ Boosted load times by splitting initial sync and loading queries off the main thread.
✨ Completely overhauled Note Version History UI with transparent loading spinner overlays and snackbars.
